description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-MacOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow also allows for manual triggering with an optional debug_enabled input. Configure and build a project on macOS, install dependencies, and setup Qt. Code-sign and notarize the app bundle, then create a DMG file and upload it as an artifact. If triggered on the master branch with a specific commit message, create a release with the artifact.
